---
title: "Designing and Facilitating Engaging and Effective Meetings"
author: "Inclusive Facilitation Series"
description: "Demonstrate a set of “Liberating Structures” for engaging, effective group meetings."
categories:
    - <span style='color:#0096c7'>Work with Adaptability</span>
    - <span style='color:#55a630'>Active Listening</span>
    - <span style='color:#55a630'>Build Capacity in Others</span>
    - <span style='color:#55a630'>Embrace Complexity</span>
    - <span style='color:#55a630'>Move at the Speed of Trust</span>
    - <span style='color:#55a630'>Work to Transform Power</span>
    - <span style='color:#7b2cbf'>Deliver High Quality Results</span>
format:
  html:
    title-block-categories: false
---
 
## Session Materials 

To visit this session's materials, click [here](https://legacyworksgroup.github.io/inclusive-facilitation/content/meetings.html) or see below.

```{=html}
<iframe src="https://legacyworksgroup.github.io/inclusive-facilitation/content/meetings.html" height="550" width="800" style="border: 1px solid #2e3846;"></iframe>
```
